entities.name: valoctocogene roxaparvovec
entities.context: Valoctocogene roxaparvovec (AAV5-hFVIII-SQ) is an adeno-associated virus 5 (AAV5)-based gene-therapy vector containing a coagulation factor VIII complementary DNA driven by a liver-selective promoter.

relations.evidence: Valoctocogene Roxaparvovec Gene Therapy for Hemophilia A
a phase 3 study to evaluate the efficacy and safety of valoctocogene roxaparvovec in men with severe hemophilia A
Elevations in alanine aminotransferase levels occurred in 115 of 134 participants (85.8%)
The other most common adverse events were headache (38.1%)
who had been receiving prophylaxis with factor VIII concentrate
adeno-associated virus 5 (AAV5)-based gene-therapy vector containing a coagulation factor VIII complementary DNA driven by a liver-selective promoter
severe hemophilia A, defined as a factor VIII level of 1 IU per deciliter or lower
